title: Backend Developer Vacancy at DRDO - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at DRDO - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DRDO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About DRDO:
DRDO is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DRDO!
